userStories.title: Custom fonts: Quilon-Medium + Rowan-Regular
acceptanceCriteria: expo-font installed and useFonts() called in App.tsx
Quilon-Medium.otf loaded as 'Quilon-Medium'
Rowan-Regular.otf loaded as 'Rowan-Regular'
app.json updated with fonts asset bundle
All heading Text components use fontFamily: 'Quilon-Medium'
All body Text components use fontFamily: 'Rowan-Regular'
AppLoading or SplashScreen shown while fonts load
TypeScript compiles without errors
userStories.notes: Fonts are copied to assets/fonts/. Use expo-font useFonts hook. Show splash until fonts ready. Apply Quilon to titles (h1-h4 equivalent), Rowan to body text.

userStories.title: Typography scale exact — letter-spacing, line-height, sizes
acceptanceCriteria: tailwind.config.js updated with exact type scale from web (h1: 31.25px, h2: 25px, h3: 22.36px, body: 16px, caption: 13.53px, overline: 12.11px)
Letter-spacing classes added: tracking-tight (0.015em), tracking-normal (0.02em), tracking-wide (0.03em)
Line-height classes: leading-heading (1.55), leading-body (1.60), leading-caption (1.65)
All existing screens updated to use proper type scale classes
TypeScript compiles without errors
userStories.notes: Read tailwind.config.js from web. Match EXACTLY. NativeWind supports custom fontSize/lineHeight/letterSpacing in tailwind.config.js extend.

userStories.title: Design tokens — card patterns, glow shadow, buttons
acceptanceCriteria: tailwind.config.js updated with: card-primary (bg-white/[0.02] rounded-2xl), card-secondary (bg-white/[0.04] rounded-xl)
Gold glow shadow defined: boxShadow '0 0 20px rgba(212,175,55,0.3)'
btn-primary class: bg-primary (accent) text-black font-semibold
btn-secondary class: bg-white/[0.06] text-white
Gold color palette extended: gold-vivid #EFBF04, gold-medium #D4A804, gold-pale #F5D54A, gold-dark #B8920A
Recovery state colors: recovering #C49600, almost #8B9A3F, ready #5C8A5C
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read tailwind.config.js colors + index.css component layer. Shadows in RN use elevation on Android and shadowColor/shadowRadius on iOS. NativeWind v4 supports custom box-shadow.

userStories.title: Bottom nav — 5 items avec indicateur gold animé
acceptanceCriteria: TabNavigator updated from 4 to 5 items: Home, Workout, + (FAB center), Learn, Profile
Center FAB (+ button): gold circle, elevated, navigates to a session start screen
Active tab indicator: animated gold gradient underline (like web BottomNav)
Tab icons updated to match web: Home=🏠, Workout=💪, Learn=📚, Social/Profile=👤
Tab bar height: 60px minimum with safe area padding
Gold tint on active icon
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read BottomNav.jsx from web. The web has 5 slots: 2 left, FAB center (start session), 2 right. Use Animated for indicator. FAB should navigate to workout start flow.

userStories.title: HomeScreen — HeroCard avec greeting contextuel et XP bar
acceptanceCriteria: HeroCard component: greeting changes by time of day (Bonjour/Bonsoir/Bonne nuit)
User name displayed (from GET /users/me)
XP/level progress bar with gold color and percentage
Level badge (ex: 'Niveau 12') displayed next to name
Correct fonts: Quilon for title, Rowan for body
Matches web HeroCard.jsx visual exactly
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read HeroCard.jsx. Time-based greeting. XP/level from GET /users/stats. Create components/home/HeroCard.tsx.

userStories.title: HomeScreen — StreakChain animée
acceptanceCriteria: StreakChain component: 7 circles for each day of week
Completed days: gold fill with checkmark
Current day: gold outline pulse animation
Future days: dim white/10
Streak count displayed with AnimatedFlame emoji equivalent
Matches web StreakChain.jsx visual
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read StreakChain.jsx. Use Animated.loop for pulse on current day. Create components/home/StreakChain.tsx.

userStories.title: HomeScreen — WeeklyProgressRings (volume, sessions, intensité)
acceptanceCriteria: 3 circular progress rings: Volume, Sessions, Intensité
Each ring: gold arc on dark circle background
Percentage and value label in center
Data from GET /users/stats
Matches web WeeklyProgressRing.jsx visual
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read WeeklyProgressRing.jsx. Use react-native-svg Svg+Circle with strokeDashoffset for the arc. Install react-native-svg if not present.

userStories.title: ActiveSessionScreen — redesign fidèle au web (SetRow, RPE, poids)
acceptanceCriteria: Each set has: weight input, reps input, RPE selector (1-10), complete checkbox
Completed set: strikethrough + gold checkmark
PR indicator badge (⚡ PR) when applicable
Add set / remove set buttons
Exercise name in Quilon font, large
Set type badge: Warmup / Working / Drop Set
Matches web ExerciseCard.jsx + SetRow.jsx visual exactly
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read those 4 files. Weight/reps are TextInput. RPE is a TouchableOpacity row of circles 1-10. Create components/workout/SetRow.tsx and update ActiveSessionScreen.

userStories.title: RestTimer — cercle SVG animé (comme RestTimerCircle.jsx du web)
acceptanceCriteria: Circular timer: SVG arc that shrinks as time passes (strokeDashoffset animation)
Gold arc on dark circle
Time remaining displayed in center (large, Quilon font)
Exercise name displayed below
Skip button + sound option
Matches web RestTimerCircle.jsx visual exactly
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read RestTimerCircle.jsx. Use react-native-svg. Animated.timing for the arc. Replace current RestTimer component.

userStories.title: WorkoutScreen — Hub tabs (Programmes / Exercices / Historique)
acceptanceCriteria: WorkoutScreen shows 3 tabs: Programmes, Exercices, Historique
Tabs use same visual as web HubTabNavigation: underline indicator gold animated
Active tab indicator slides between tabs with animation
Tab label: Quilon font, uppercase, letter-spacing
Matches web Programs.jsx HubTabNavigation visual
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read HubTabNavigation.jsx. Create components/ui/HubTabNavigation.tsx reusable. Use Animated for indicator slide. Apply in WorkoutScreen.

userStories.title: ExercisesScreen — cards avec images, badges catégorie, difficulté
acceptanceCriteria: Exercise card: image (from exercise.imageUrl), name in Quilon, category badge (gold/20 bg), difficulty badge
Muscle group chips: colored by muscle group
Grid layout: 2 columns on phone
Skeleton loading (shimmer animation)
Matches web ExerciseCard.jsx visual exactly
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read ExerciseCard.jsx from web root components. Add imageUrl to Exercise type if missing. Use Image component with fallback. Grid with numColumns={2} in FlatList.

userStories.title: LearnScreen — ArticleCard avec image et ParcoursCard avec progress ring
acceptanceCriteria: ArticleCard: cover image (full width), category badge (colored), title in Quilon, read time
ParcoursCard: thumbnail image, title, modules count, progress ring (SVG circle)
Category filter pills: Tous, Technique, Nutrition, Mentalité, Anatomie
Matches web ArticleCard.jsx + ParcoursCard.jsx visual
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read both files. Articles/parcours from GET /articles and GET /parcours. Category color map: Technique=blue, Nutrition=green, Mentalité=purple, Anatomie=red.

userStories.title: ProfileScreen — stats, level badge, ActivityHeatmap
acceptanceCriteria: Profile hero: large avatar (initials fallback), name in Quilon, level badge gold
Stats grid: total workouts, current streak, PRs count, XP total
ActivityHeatmap: 52-week calendar grid (small squares), gold for active days
Matches web SocialProfileView.jsx + ActivityHeatmap.jsx visual
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read ActivityHeatmap.jsx. 52 columns (weeks) x 7 rows (days). Color intensity = workout count that day. Data from GET /users/stats or GET /users/activity. Create components/profile/ActivityHeatmap.tsx.

userStories.title: Skeleton loading — shimmer sur tous les écrans
acceptanceCriteria: SkeletonBox component: animated shimmer (Animated.loop LinearGradient or opacity pulse)
SkeletonText component: lines of varying width
Applied on: HomeScreen, WorkoutScreen, ExercisesScreen, LearnScreen, ProfileScreen
Matches web Skeleton.jsx shimmer animation visual
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read Skeleton.jsx. Use Animated.loop with interpolate opacity 0.3→0.7→0.3. Or use react-native-linear-gradient for shimmer. Create components/ui/Skeleton.tsx.

userStories.title: Toast notifications — style identique au web (useToast hook)
acceptanceCriteria: ToastContext with useToast() hook: .success(), .error(), .info(), .loading()
Toast UI: dark bg (white/[0.08]), icon colored (green/red/blue/gold), slide-in from top
Auto-dismiss after 3s
Stacks multiple toasts
Matches web toast visual
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read ToastContext.jsx. Use Animated.timing for slide-in. Render toasts in a fixed position overlay (top-safe-area). Create context/ToastContext.tsx and hooks/useToast.ts.

userStories.title: EmptyState component — identique au web
acceptanceCriteria: EmptyState component: icon (large, centered), title in Quilon, description in Rowan, optional CTA button
Props: icon (string emoji or component), title, description, cta?: { label, onPress }
Applied on all screens with empty states
Matches web EmptyState.jsx visual
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read EmptyState.jsx. Simple component. Replace all inline empty state Text with EmptyState. Create components/ui/EmptyState.tsx.

userStories.title: Workout — PlateCalculator (calculateur de disques)
acceptanceCriteria: PlateCalculator component: input a target weight, shows which plates to add each side
Barbell weight selector (20kg default)
Plates: 25, 20, 15, 10, 5, 2.5, 1.25 kg displayed as colored circles
Toggle button in active session to show/hide
Matches web PlateCalculator.jsx visual
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read PlateCalculator.jsx. Pure calculation, no API. Each plate has a color (25kg=red, 20kg=blue, 15kg=yellow, 10kg=green, 5kg=white, 2.5kg=black). Create components/workout/PlateCalculator.tsx.

userStories.title: Charts — Historique avec VolumeAreaChart et SessionsBarChart
acceptanceCriteria: HistoryScreen shows charts section: Volume par semaine (area chart), Sessions par semaine (bar chart)
Install victory-native or react-native-chart-kit
Gold color for data, dark background
Data from GET /workout-sessions (aggregate client-side)
Matches web charts visual (approximate)
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read both chart files. Check context7 for victory-native docs. Install victory-native (works with Expo). Aggregate session data client-side for the charts.

userStories.title: Animations — fadeInUp, scaleIn sur les cartes et transitions
acceptanceCriteria: FadeIn wrapper component using Animated.timing (opacity 0→1, translateY 20→0)
Applied on card lists (staggered delay per item index)
ScaleIn for modals and dialogs (scale 0.9→1)
Respects reduced motion preference (no animation if enabled)
Matches web Framer Motion animations (visual equivalent)
TypeScript compiles
userStories.notes: Read FadeIn.jsx. Use Animated.timing or react-native-reanimated. Stagger: each item gets delay = index * 50ms. Create components/ui/FadeIn.tsx.

userStories.title: Polish final — grain texture, safe areas, scroll behaviors
acceptanceCriteria: useSafeAreaInsets applied on all screens (replace pt-12 manual padding)
Scrollbar hidden on all ScrollViews
Pull-to-refresh on HomeScreen, WorkoutScreen, LearnScreen
KeyboardAvoidingView sur tous les formulaires
StatusBar style='light' confirmed everywhere
All screens use Quilon/Rowan fonts consistently
Final tsc check: zero errors
Git commit with all changes
userStories.notes: Global polish pass. Check every screen. Fix inconsistencies. This is the final story before COMPLETE.
